forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely this afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the morning, mainly in the north. Medium chance of showers about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost in the north. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from late this morning. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 13.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

The chance of morning frost near the eastern border. The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost in the south. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers during the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of fog and frost in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Patches of morning frost in the west. The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely late this afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 15.
Partly cloudy. Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Partly cloudy. Areas of frost in the morning, mainly in the east. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost in the east. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Patches of morning frost south of Hawker. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower during the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h early in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southerly in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h before dawn then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending easterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, becoming less likely this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of morning frost south of Leigh Creek. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Patches of frost and the chance of fog south of Yunta in the morning. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. The chance of morning frost south of Leigh Creek. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
